title: UPSRTC Meerut Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 in Uttar Pradesh, India - Apply Now
excerpt: UPSRTC Meerut is recruiting bus conductors in Uttar Pradesh, India. Apply online from 09/07/2026 to 17/07/2026. No application fee is required.

About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (UPSRTC) is a government-owned corporation that operates bus services in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

The corporation was established with the aim of providing efficient and affordable transportation services to the people of Uttar Pradesh.


About the Programme

The UPSRTC Meerut Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens to work as bus conductors in the Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of bus conductor in the Meerut district of Uttar Pradesh.
